name: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv
summary: A comprehensive public research university with strong programs in science, humanities, economics, law, and international relations.

name: Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute
summary: A large technical university focused on engineering, computer science, applied sciences, and innovation.

name: Ivan Franko National University of Lviv
summary: A historic multidisciplinary university offering programs across humanities, natural sciences, law, economics, and technology.
